Class PlaybackAggregator

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.PlaybackAggregator
public final class PlaybackAggregator extends Object
Utility class that aggregates PlaybackHistory records into report-ready values.

Centralizes the aggregation logic that was previously copy-pasted verbatim across three report services: WeeklyReportService, MonthlyReportService, and YearEndReportService. Each service contained identical stream pipelines for computing valid song counts, total minutes, top song, top artist, top album, and top genre.

Every method accepts a pre-filtered List<PlaybackHistory> so the callers remain in control of which time window they pass in. Filtering to valid plays (PlaybackConstants.isValidPlay(Integer)) is applied internally so callers never need to repeat that guard either.

All methods are static. This class is not instantiable.

Time Complexity: O(n) per method, where n = history.size().
Space Complexity: O(k) per method, where k = distinct entities grouped.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int
    countValidPlays(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
    Counts the number of valid plays in the history list.
    static Song
    findTopAlbumSong(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
    Returns the Song whose album was played most among valid plays.
    static Artist
    findTopArtist(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
    Returns the most frequently credited Artist among valid plays.
    static Genre
    findTopGenre(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
    Returns the most frequently encountered Genre among valid plays.
    static Song
    findTopSong(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
    Returns the most frequently played Song among valid plays, or null if no valid plays exist.
    static int
    sumValidMinutes(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
    Sums the duration of all valid plays and converts to whole minutes.

  • Method Details

    • countValidPlays

      public static int countValidPlays(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
      Counts the number of valid plays in the history list.
      Parameters:
      history - the playback records to count; must not be null
      Returns:
      count of records that pass PlaybackConstants.isValidPlay(Integer)

    • sumValidMinutes

      public static int sumValidMinutes(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
      Sums the duration of all valid plays and converts to whole minutes.

      Integer division is intentional — truncate, not round — consistent with the original behaviour in all three report services.

      Parameters:
      history - the playback records to sum; must not be null
      Returns:
      total valid listening time in minutes

    • findTopSong

      public static Song findTopSong(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
      Returns the most frequently played Song among valid plays, or null if no valid plays exist.
      Parameters:
      history - the playback records to analyse; must not be null
      Returns:
      the top Song by play count, or null

    • findTopArtist

      public static Artist findTopArtist(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
      Returns the most frequently credited Artist among valid plays.

      Multi-artist songs contribute a count to each of their artists, consistent with the original behaviour in all three report services.

      Parameters:
      history - the playback records to analyse; must not be null
      Returns:
      the top Artist by credited play count, or null

    • findTopAlbumSong

      public static Song findTopAlbumSong(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
      Returns the Song whose album was played most among valid plays.

      Only songs that belong to an album are considered. The return type is Song (not Album) because the report entities store topAlbum as a Song reference — the most-played track from the top album — matching the original behaviour in all three services.

      Parameters:
      history - the playback records to analyse; must not be null
      Returns:
      the most-played Song that has a non-null album, or null if no qualifying plays exist

    • findTopGenre

      public static Genre findTopGenre(List<PlaybackHistory> history)
      Returns the most frequently encountered Genre among valid plays.

      Multi-genre songs contribute a count to each of their genres, consistent with the original behaviour in all three report services.

      Parameters:
      history - the playback records to analyse; must not be null
      Returns:
      the top Genre by credited play count, or null
